title: Showing Commutability Using a Causal Signal and an Anticausal Signal
summary: This page presents convolution illustrations for causal, anticausal, and shifted signals. It includes Figure 2.11 and two drill exercises, 2.12 and 2.13, asking the reader to repeat a previous commutativity demonstration for the signals shown in Figures 2.12 and 2.13.

figures.caption: Convolution of causal signals x(t) and g(t).
Convolution of causal x(t) and anticausal g(t).
Convolution of shifted signals x(t) and g(t).
